description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by dense greenery and a perimeter fence, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The structure features a dark, gabled roof with multiple sections and large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, lounge area, and paved walkways, creating an inviting outdoor living space. The front of the house is marked by a driveway leading to a main entrance, partially obscured by manicured hedges. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees and shrubs encircling the property, enhancing its suburban character.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, large windows, and a private backyard featuring a swimming pool, all surrounded by dense greenery and a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and manicured hedges partially obscuring the house.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, lounge area, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and large windows facing the backyard, with dense trees along the property line.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the dark roof, side yard, and the pool area with surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved driveway, partially hidden by hedges, featuring a simple modern door and no prominent porch or columns.
